creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* 	The current Vim-3.0 port assumes you have X11R6 libraries around
 * 	at compile/runtime.

I don't think this is particularly bad, it's up to the porter to
choose what set of features to include.  There are lots of ports that
require X11R6 without telling you so.

Unless the added functionality is really useless (like, only used for
annoying confirmation popups ;), I'm inclined to only take the
lib/vim.hlp -> share/misc/vim.hlp suggestion and leave the X11 part
alone.

Satoshi
